results.question: What is the average value of observations for each commodity in the year 2020?
results.expected_answer:
SOYBEANS | 1384268.5
CAULIFLOWER | 301.97623
VEGETABLE TOTALS | 38.41781
PEAS | 5577.006
BEANS | 1835.6147
CELERY | 71.32136
PUMPKINS | 2069.6313
LETTUCE | 3382.5762
CARROTS | 391.0734
ONIONS | 8096.544
... (21 total rows)
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?commodityLabel (AVG(xsd:float(?observationValue)) AS ?averageObservationValue) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics> WHERE {
  ?observation <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/type/Observation> .
  ?observation <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/observation_of_commodity> ?commodity .
  ?commodity <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/type/Commodity> .
  ?commodity <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?commodityLabel .
  ?observation <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/observation_in_year> ?year .
  ?year <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/type/Year> .
  ?year <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/year> "2020" .
  ?observation <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/value> ?observationValue .
} GROUP BY ?commodityLabel

results.question: List the states and the count of distinct statistic categories observed in each state.
results.expected_answer:
OREGON | 3
NEW JERSEY | 3
CALIFORNIA | 3
NORTH DAKOTA | 3
ALABAMA | 3
MONTANA | 3
WASHINGTON | 3
WISCONSIN | 3
PENNSYLVANIA | 3
INDIANA | 3
... (50 total rows)
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?stateName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?statCat) AS ?distinctStatisticCategories) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics> WHERE {
  ?observation <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/type/Observation> .
  ?observation <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/observation_in_state> ?state .
  ?state <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/type/State> .
  ?state <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/state_name> ?stateName .
  ?observation <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/observation_stat_category> ?statisticCategory .
  ?statisticCategory <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/type/StatisticCategory> .
  ?statisticCategory <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-usda-agricultural-statistics/pred/stat_cat> ?statCat .
} GROUP BY ?stateName

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Observation: 10000 rows (from Observation.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Observation" (
  "obs_id" TEXT,
  "commodity" TEXT,
  "state_alpha" TEXT,
  "year" INTEGER,
  "stat_cat" TEXT,
  "unit_desc" TEXT,
  "value" REAL,
  "short_desc" TEXT,
  "domain_desc" TEXT,
  "domaincat_desc" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Observation:
--   obs_id='343e7d7f9143', commodity='COTTON', state_alpha='AR', year='2021', stat_cat='PEST MGMT', unit_desc='PCT OF AREA PLANTED', value='78', short_desc='COTTON - PEST MGMT, MEASURED IN PCT OF A', domain_desc='PRACTICE, SUPPRESSION', domaincat_desc='PRACTICE, SUPPRESSION: (PESTICIDES WITH '
--   obs_id='a4a759955e2f', commodity='SOYBEANS', state_alpha='MO', year='2020', stat_cat='APPLICATIONS', unit_desc='LB / ACRE / APPLICATION, AVG', value='0.142', short_desc='SOYBEANS - APPLICATIONS, MEASURED IN LB ', domain_desc='CHEMICAL, HERBICIDE', domaincat_desc='CHEMICAL, HERBICIDE: (FLUMIOXAZIN = 1290'

-- Table Commodity: 58 rows (from Commodity.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Commodity" (
  "commodity" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Commodity:
--   commodity='COTTON'
--   commodity='SOYBEANS'

-- Table State: 50 rows (from State.csv)
CREATE TABLE "State" (
  "state_alpha" TEXT,
  "state_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from State:
--   state_alpha='AR', state_name='ARKANSAS'
--   state_alpha='MO', state_name='MISSOURI'

-- Table Year: 5 rows (from Year.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Year" (
  "year" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Year:
--   year='2021'
--   year='2020'

-- Table StatisticCategory: 3 rows (from StatisticCategory.csv)
CREATE TABLE "StatisticCategory" (
  "stat_cat" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from StatisticCategory:
--   stat_cat='PEST MGMT'
--   stat_cat='APPLICATIONS'

-- Table Unit: 11 rows (from Unit.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Unit" (
  "unit_desc" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Unit:
--   unit_desc='PCT OF AREA PLANTED'
--   unit_desc='LB / ACRE / APPLICATION, AVG'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   Observation.obs_id -> Commodity.commodity
--   Observation.obs_id -> State.state_alpha
--   Observation.obs_id -> StatisticCategory.stat_cat
--   Observation.obs_id -> Unit.unit_desc
--   Observation.obs_id -> Year.year
